title: euryops chrysanthemoides
intro: Euryops chrysanthemoides, also known as the golden daisy or yellow paper flower, is a shrubby perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Euryops chrysanthemoides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
